name: SoFi Technologies, Inc.
business: SoFi provides a digital financial services platform offering lending products (personal loans, student loans, home loans) and financial services (checking/savings accounts, credit cards, crypto trading, investment accounts, financial management tools) to individual members, and technology platform services (cloud-native banking, event platforms, AI solutions) to enterprises.

exposures.sentence: We offer personal loans, student loans, home loans and related servicing and offer a variety of financial services products, such as SoFi Money, SoFi Credit Card, SoFi Crypto, SoFi Invest and SoFi Relay, that provide more daily interactions with our members.

We also offer additional add-on technology solutions to support our clients and drive engagement, such as a conversational AI engine for customers of banks and financial institutions, and a real-time payment risk platform which employs AI and machine learning technology to enhance payment fraud mitigation strategies for financial customers.
We intend to continue to explore other products for SoFi Bank over time, including stablecoin issuance and tokenized deposits.
